witness.expan: Transcription of MS Kathmandu KL 699: Cikitsāsthāna, adhyāyas 21-40
Transcription of MS Kathmandu KL 699: Cikitsāsthāna, adhyāyas 21-40 [ante correctionem]
Transcription of MS Kathmandu KL 699: Cikitsāsthāna, adhyāyas 21-40 [post correctionem]
Transcription of MS Kathmandu NAK 5-333, Cikitsāsthāna, adhyāyas 21-40
Transcription of MS Kathmandu NAK 5-333, Cikitsāsthāna, adhyāyas 21-40 [ante correctionem]
Transcription of MS Kathmandu NAK 5-333, Cikitsāsthāna, adhyāyas 21-40 [post correctionem]
The Nepalese Version of the Suśrutasaṃhitā, Cikitsāsthāna 21-40, based on the Nepalese MSS

normalization.ab: visarga aḥ before unvoiced consonants and space + anusvāra
